description: Pick a model backend (llama.cpp or Ollama), then browse, filter, and install AI models. Supports CSV direct install, interactive picker, and uninstall.

commands.(no args): Interactive: pick backend, then open the backend's picker
commands.<csv>: Direct install: comma-separated model ids (e.g. qwen2.5-coder-3b,llama3.2)
commands.list: Show all known models (both backends) with ids
commands.uninstall: List locally installed models from BOTH backends, multi-select, delete
commands.uninstall llama: Uninstall picker scoped to llama.cpp GGUF files only
commands.uninstall ollama: Uninstall picker scoped to Ollama daemon models only

parameters.-Backend: Force a backend: llama-cpp or ollama (skips backend prompt; also scopes uninstall)
parameters.-Install: CSV of model ids/slugs to install non-interactively

messages.pickBackend: Which model backend would you like to use?
messages.backendLlama: [1] llama.cpp  -- GGUF files, hardware-aware picker, runs offline (recommended)
messages.backendOllama: [2] Ollama     -- Managed daemon, simple pull/run, ~12 GB tooling
messages.csvNoneFound: None of the requested model ids matched any catalog. Use 'list' to see available ids.
messages.uninstallScanning: Scanning local installations across both backends...
messages.uninstallNothing: No locally installed models found. Nothing to uninstall.
messages.uninstallAborted: Uninstall aborted by user. Nothing was deleted.
messages.uninstallSkipped: No selection made. Nothing was deleted.
messages.uninstallPartial: Uninstall finished with one or more failures -- review the log above.
